title: Method: hello
description: Mandatory first request after a WebSocket connection is established. The client declares the protocol_version it speaks. The server either accepts (Response.ok=true with its own identification) or closes the connection with an UNSUPPORTED_PROTOCOL_VERSION error. After a successful hello no further version negotiation happens; the contract is fixed for the session.

protocol_version.description: Major version of the protocol the client implements. Currently '1'.
Protocol version the server agrees to speak for this session.

PeerInfo.title: PeerInfo
PeerInfo.description: Self-identification of a protocol peer (client or server).

name.description: Stable identifier of the peer implementation.

version.description: Semver version of the peer build.
